core_content.markdown:
## SOME FACTS 

1. There are 360million people who speak English asa first language. 1.55billion people worldwide speak it t as a second dor ·additional language. The British Council claims that 25per cent of the world's population has some understanding of English.



2. Approximately 3million new books swritten in English are published annually.

3.55%of the internet t is in English.The second most popular internet language is Russian at just under 6%.



4.In South Africa the best predictor of university Success regardless of field of study is the matric English mark.
